g.text: Administrator fills the dock creation form\nand clicks "Create Dock"
Validates required fields:\nName, Location, Length, Depth, MaxDraft, MaxSTS.\nEnsures MaxDraft ≤ Depth
SELECT * FROM VesselTypes WHERE Id IN (ids)
Creates domain entity with IsActive = true\nand initializes STSCranes = []
Displays confirmation message\nand redirects to dock details page
400 Bad Request + "Dock with this name already exists"
